title: Silky Russian Fideo Noodles
description: A creamy, buttery fideo noodle dish that melts in the mouth, perfect for kids and nut‑free family meals.
instructions: Bring a pot of salted water to a rolling boil, add the fideo noodles, and cook for 3–4 minutes until al dente; drain and set aside.
In a saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Whisk in the flour to make a roux, cooking for 1–2 minutes until lightly golden.
Gradually pour in the milk, whisking continuously until the sauce thickens and becomes smooth, about 3–4 minutes.
Reduce the heat to low and stir in the Parmesan cheese until fully melted.
Add the cooked fideo noodles to the sauce and toss to coat evenly.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Cook together for an additional 2 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld.
Transfer to serving dishes, sprinkle with chopped parsley, and serve warm.
